verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As of old, when the hosts of Israel Were compelled in the wilderness to dwell. Trusting in their God to lead the way To the light of the perfect day.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So the sign of the fire by night, And the sign of the cloud by day, Hovering o'er, just before, As the journey on their way. Shall a guide and leader be, Till the wilderness be past. For the Lord, our God, in His own good time Shall lead to the light at last.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To and fro, as ship without a sail. Not a compass to guide them through the vale, But the sign of their God was ever near, Thus their fainting hearts to cheer.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All the days of their wand'rings they were fed, To land of the promise they were led: By the hand of the Lord in guidance sure. They were brought to Canaan's shore.
